voice_observations.caption_text:
Come Together with Natalie & Achraf from @bonedotstudio 

Partners in life and in Bone, Natalie and Achraf share how coming together means home, family, and open hearts. From merging perspectives to building a brand, their connection is the foundation of everything they create.

Natalie wears Le Monde Beryl, and Achraf wears Jacquemus, available on levelshoes.com
notable_phrases: Come Together with Natalie & Achraf from

Partners in life and in Bone, Natalie and Achraf share how coming together means home, family, and open hearts. From merging perspectives to building a brand, their connection is the foundation of everything they create
Natalie wears Le Monde Beryl, and Achraf wears Jacquemus, available on levelshoes.com
voice_observations.voiceover_text: Home to me is Ashraf. It's true. Her smile every morning. You know, it's like the thermometer of the day. I see her smile, I'm like, okay, everything is gonna be all right. Hi, I'm Ashraf. And I'm Nathalie, and we're partners in both life and in Bonn. Coming together for me means merging different perspectives, different backgrounds, listening to one another. I think just being open. For me, coming together is family and friends. I would describe Ashraf as spontaneous, challenging, and my rock. I would describe Nathalie as fearless, our foundation, and she's just home. If I were a shoe, I would be a clog. If I were a shoe, I would be a Moroccan babouche. If Bonn were a shoe, I think we would be the Boston Birkenstocks. Combined with the Margiela Tabi, a version of that. My family, my best friend, and my home. My pillar, my shoulder to cry on, my comfort zone.
